ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortgage_lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "loan_value_2021" REAL /* Total loan value for 2021 */,
  "loan_value_2022" REAL /* Total loan value for 2022 */,
  "loan_value_2023" REAL /* Total loan value for 2023 */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in loan value from 2021 to 2022 */,
  "percent_change_2022_2023" REAL /* Percentage change in loan value from 2022 to 2023 */,
  "market_share_2022" REAL /* Market share of the lender in 2022 */,
  "market_share_2023" REAL /* Market share of the lender in 2023 */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the lender's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the lender was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the lender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the lender */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the lender */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the lender */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the lender */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the lender */,
  "num_branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches or offices */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lender_loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the mortgage_lenders table */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., fixed-rate, adjustable-rate) */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lender_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the mortgage_lenders table */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the branch is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the branch is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
